[PDF_PAGE 58 | score=8] mariners have led a somewhat nomadic existence. They nev- er settle permanently: the urge to travel fills their blood. Lifestyle The barbarians of Krynn live nomadically. They find life in cities and towns stifling and harsh compared to that in the wilds. They roam their home terrain, following the migrations of beasts and the change of seasons. Barbarians love nature. They respect the powers of the earth, and revere those who wield such powers. The sea barbarians live differently. Although they spend most of their time at sea, they do dock occasionally. Descen- dants of city dwellers, these barbarians maintain port cities where they can rest and sell their cargos.
